name: Stewed Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the sweet potatoes into small cubes.
2. Place a layer of sweet potato cubes in a saucepan, then add sugar, butter, and a sprinkle of salt.
3. Continue adding layers until all the potatoes are used up.
4. Cover with water and add one cinnamon stick or two ginger pieces.
5. Cook gently until the potatoes are tender.
6. When the potatoes are cooked, add a small amount of sherry (if using) and thicken the stew with a pinch of cornflour.
Note: Posted by Stephen Ceideburg November 25, 1990.
